articles.title: AI startup Rocket offers vibe McKinsey-style reports at a fraction of the cost
articles.description: Rocket's new AI platform combines strategy, product building, and competitive intelligence, aiming to move beyond code generation.
articles.author: Jagmeet Singh

articles.title: AI design platform Picsart launches a creator monetization program
articles.description: The program invites creators to create original content with Picsart tools for a specific campaign, share it on their social channels, and earn
articles.author: Aisha Malik
